title: Knowledge Base Index Shard
description: A tier-sharded slice of the repo-wide knowledge-base index. One file per tier (index.root.json, index.packages.json, index.components.json) is produced by scripts/knowledge-base/generate-index.js. Per-field constraints are sourced from config/knowledge-base/frontmatter.config.json so the index and the frontmatter contract cannot drift.

generatedFrom.description: Repo-relative path to the generator script.

tier.description: Tier number that this shard contains. All entries in `topics` share this tier.

id.description: Stable, path-derived identifier in the form tier<n>/<repo-relative-path-without-extension>.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the topic markdown file.

canonical.description: Repo-relative path to the canonical topic file when this entry is a cross-tier stub. Null otherwise.
